description: Implement Analytics, Export/Import, Meeting Transcript parsing, and final integration testing. This covers the remaining Phase 1 features: task history with productivity insights, CSV/JSON export-import, meeting transcript paste-and-parse screen, and comprehensive unit tests to validate the complete system.
steps: Create AnalyticsViewModel at app/src/main/java/com/procrastinationkiller/presentation/analytics/AnalyticsViewModel.kt computing: completed today/week/month, pending backlog, completion rate, most ignored tasks, productivity trends

Create AnalyticsScreen composable at app/src/main/java/com/procrastinationkiller/presentation/analytics/AnalyticsScreen.kt with charts for productivity trends, filter by time range (hour, day, week, month, custom), completion rate display, most ignored tasks list
Create AnalyticsUseCase at app/src/main/java/com/procrastinationkiller/domain/usecase/AnalyticsUseCase.kt that queries task history and computes statistics

Create ExportImportService at app/src/main/java/com/procrastinationkiller/data/export/ExportImportService.kt supporting CSV and JSON formats. Export fields: title, description, source app, sender, created date, due date, priority, status, tags, notes, original notification text
Create CsvExporter and JsonExporter at app/src/main/java/com/procrastinationkiller/data/export/ using Apache Commons CSV and kotlinx.serialization respectively
Create CsvImporter and JsonImporter at app/src/main/java/com/procrastinationkiller/data/export/ that parse imported files and create tasks

Create ExportImportScreen composable at app/src/main/java/com/procrastinationkiller/presentation/settings/ExportImportScreen.kt with manual export button, import file picker, scheduled auto-export toggle
Create MeetingTranscriptViewModel at app/src/main/java/com/procrastinationkiller/presentation/transcript/MeetingTranscriptViewModel.kt that accepts pasted text and runs task extraction

Create MeetingTranscriptScreen composable at app/src/main/java/com/procrastinationkiller/presentation/transcript/MeetingTranscriptScreen.kt with large text input area, Analyze button, results showing extracted action items with owner detection if possible, and bulk approve/reject

Create TranscriptAnalyzer at app/src/main/java/com/procrastinationkiller/domain/engine/TranscriptAnalyzer.kt that splits transcript by speakers/sentences, runs keyword engine on each segment, detects action item owners from context (e.g., '@person will do X' or 'Person, please do X')
Add navigation routes for Analytics and MeetingTranscript screens to NavGraph.kt
Create scheduled auto-export WorkManager job at app/src/main/java/com/procrastinationkiller/service/AutoExportWorker.kt

Create DailyReportWorker at app/src/main/java/com/procrastinationkiller/service/DailyReportWorker.kt that generates daily summary and sends via email intent (ACTION_SEND) with: tasks completed, pending tasks, high priority pending, productivity summary, completion percentage

Create comprehensive integration-style unit tests at app/src/test/java/com/procrastinationkiller/ testing: full notification-to-task pipeline, export/import round-trip, transcript analysis with Hindi/English/Hinglish input, analytics calculations
Create sample keyword dataset JSON file at app/src/main/assets/default_keywords.json with all the keywords from the requirements organized by category

Create a demo data generator utility at app/src/main/java/com/procrastinationkiller/util/DemoDataGenerator.kt that populates the database with sample tasks, notifications, and analytics for testing/demo purposes
acceptance_criteria: Analytics screen shows completion stats with time range filtering
CSV export produces valid CSV file with all task fields
JSON export produces valid JSON with all task fields
Import correctly creates tasks from CSV and JSON files
Meeting transcript screen extracts action items from pasted text
Transcript analysis works with English, Hindi, and Hinglish text
Daily report worker generates summary email intent
Auto-export worker runs on configured schedule
Demo data generator creates realistic sample data
findings: All 150 tests pass (101 existing + 49 new). Build compiles cleanly. Used manual StringBuilder-based CSV writing since Apache Commons CSV is not in libs.versions.toml. Used kotlinx.serialization for JSON export/import. Used Compose Canvas for the productivity chart. TranscriptAnalyzer reuses KeywordEngine for multilingual support. The assignment pattern uses {2,} minimum word length to avoid matching pronouns like 'I' as owners. NotificationParser.parse() requires StatusBarNotification (Android framework), so integration test uses extractSender() directly instead.
